items.title: By my projections Suns will be roughly $4.6M under the tax and $12.6M under the first apron after re-signing Collin Gillespie. Can create more room if they move on from Haywood Highsmith and/or Jamaree Bouyea.
items.author: KeithSmithNBA
items.body_excerpt:
By my projections Suns will be roughly $4.6M under the tax and $12.6M under the first apron after re-signing Collin Gillespie. Can create more room if they move on from Haywood Highsmith and/or Jamaree Bouyea.
It'll get tight to avoid the first apron if they re-sign Mark Williams and Jordan Goodwin.

media.title: Sources: Gillespie returning to Suns on 4-year, $48 million deal
media.description: Collin Gillespie, who is coming off a breakout campaign with the Suns, intends to sign a four-year, $48 million deal to remain with the team, sources told ESPN on Saturday.

items.title: That's a good value for both Collin Gillespie and Phoenix. He earned a much bigger deal than the two-ways and minimums he's been on. Suns keep him for $12M AAV. Really solid.
items.author: KeithSmithNBA
items.body_excerpt:
That's a good value for both Collin Gillespie and Phoenix. He earned a much bigger deal than the two-ways and minimums he's been on. Suns keep him for $12M AAV. Really solid.

If using standard raises, contract will look roughly like this:

26-27: $10.7M
27-28: $11.6 M
28-29: $12.4M
29-30: $13.3M

items.title: Most teams could've offered Collin Gillespie the $15.1 million non-taxpayer mid-level exception. The Suns could've topped such offers by having his Early Bird rights.
items.author: Yossi Gozlan
items.body_excerpt:
Most teams could've offered Collin Gillespie the $15.1 million non-taxpayer mid-level exception. The Suns could've topped such offers by having his Early Bird rights.

His deal comes in right around where he'd been projected at. T.J. McConnell's deal but adjust for cap inflation.

items.title: Phoenix Suns salary cap situation after re-signing Collin Gillespie.
items.author: Yossi Gozlan
items.body_excerpt:
Phoenix Suns salary cap situation after re-signing Collin Gillespie.

They are projected to be just $4 million under the $200.5 million luxury tax line.

They'll need to reduce payroll to re-sign Jordan Goodwin and fill up the roster while staying under the tax line.

items.title: Free agent guard Collin Gillespie intends to sign a four-year, $48 million deal to return to the Phoenix Suns, sources tell ESPN. Gillespie spent three straight seasons on two-way contracts after going undrafted out of Villanova in 2022 and now earns a lucrative long-term deal.
items.author: Shams Charania Tweets
items.body_excerpt: Free agent guard Collin Gillespie intends to sign a four-year, $48 million deal to return to the Phoenix Suns, sources tell ESPN. Gillespie spent three straight seasons on two-way contracts after going undrafted out of Villanova in 2022 and now earns a lucrative long-term deal.

items.title: June 20, 1993: Chicago's Horace Grant blocks Kevin Johnson as time expires in Game 6, and the Bulls hold on for a 99-98 win over the Suns in Phoenix—clinching their 3rd NBA Championship in a row.
items.author: NBA Cobwebs
items.body_excerpt:
June 20, 1993: Chicago's Horace Grant blocks Kevin Johnson as time expires in Game 6, and the Bulls hold on for a 99-98 win over the Suns in Phoenix—clinching their 3rd NBA Championship in a row.

Grant also assisted on John Paxson's game-winning three with 3.9 seconds remaining.
